_comment: Reference fragment for pi's settings.json. Pi has no MCP server config (see pi's README: 'No MCP'); the coord verbs come from the coord.ts extension itself, which registers coord_msg_{send,ls,read,archive,thread} via pi.registerTool(). The push side (notifications on new arrivals) also lives in coord.ts. This file is optional — pi auto-discovers ~/.pi/agent/extensions/*.ts on startup.
_comment2: Drop coord.ts at one of these auto-discovery paths and you don't need anything below: ~/.pi/agent/extensions/coord.ts (global) or .pi/extensions/coord.ts (project-local). The 'extensions' array below is only useful if you want to load coord.ts from somewhere else.
_comment3: If you want to install @myobie/coord (and @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent for typecheck) into a node_modules pi can resolve, drop a package.json next to coord.ts — see the README in this directory for the recipe.
